agent.name: YouTube Skip Maintainer
agent.description: Monitors YouTube for UI changes that break ad-skip detection and keeps the AdSkipper Android app's SKIP_PATTERNS up to date. When YouTube renames or reshuffles its skip/next button view IDs, this agent finds the new IDs and pushes the fix to GitHub automatically.

secrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
secrets.description: Fine-grained personal access token with Contents read+write on GeneralInfluence/YouTubeSkip. Used to push pattern updates.

tasks.name: weekly-pattern-check
tasks.prompt: Check whether the current SKIP_PATTERNS in AdSkipperService.kt are likely still valid. Search for any recent community reports (Reddit r/youtube, GitHub issues, forum posts) about YouTube's skip ad button changing. If credible reports exist, summarize the new view IDs found and open a GitHub issue on GeneralInfluence/YouTubeSkip describing what needs updating.
